text:
trying to upgrade from 3.4 to 4.3, cant find cdrom (which i installed 3.4 from
userconfig doesn't show matcd0 like 3.4 did so i cant change vales or
disable sony cdrom (which is how i did it last time)

How-To-Repeat: boot from install floppies and go into userconfig to see devices
